caption: A woman with her hair styled in a high bun and wearing black headphones is recorded in a studio setting. She is wearing a black t-shirt featuring a white graphic and speaks into a professional black microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind her is a light-colored wall with a vertical yellow stripe and a screen displaying the name "Johnson" in red text above a graphic. To her left and right, logos are visible on the screen and wall, including "STUDIO PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101," with the latter accompanied by smaller text that reads "In the Logo Studio." Across the sequence, the woman maintains a consistent position, shifting her facial expressions slightly as she speaks, with her mouth moving and her eyes narrowing slightly in a thoughtful or emotive manner.
